facebook.caption: Under $15 for coffee, pastries, and a full sit-down break in Phu Quoc. MIX BAKERY COFFEE & TEA on 156 Đ. 30 Tháng 4 is pulling 4.5 stars across 604 reviews and still feels like a local spot. Not a resort café price in sight. Grab a table, order something baked, and actually slow down for an hour. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
